findings: Concise and coherent, but still a methods note rather than a journal-ready article.
required_fixes: Expand into selected journal structure after protocol and results tracks complete.

findings: The draft identifies validation commands but does not yet provide full results, comparisons, or threats to validity.
required_fixes: Add results/discussion evidence tables and explicit evaluation limits.

findings: The prose is clear, but several sections need fuller transitions and manuscript-ready captions.
required_fixes: Add final article-level transitions, figure callouts, and supplement references.

findings: Submission declarations, target journal requirements, cover-letter inputs, and supplement assets are missing.
required_fixes: Complete journal requirements and submission package track before publication readiness.

findings: Semantic alignment is cited, but MIRO-style ontology reporting details are not yet itemized.
required_fixes: Add ontology development protocol, terminology crosswalk, and ontology inventory tables.

findings: The OIA human-certification boundary is strong, but public-administration contribution needs clearer positioning.
required_fixes: Add discussion of administrative process value and public-data limits without official reporting claims.

findings: The non-legal-advice boundary is explicit, but source-version provenance needs integration into the manuscript.
required_fixes: Link legal-source jurisdiction/provider provenance and checklist adherence in the protocol and supplement.

findings: The draft avoids cost/time overclaims, but it does not yet explain what reporting metrics cannot support economic inference.
required_fixes: Add limitations on non-derivable cost, staff-time, and performance metrics.

findings: State/event modelling is described, but process-flow evidence and queue/review implications are not yet visualized.
required_fixes: Add process-flow figures, event/state tables, and workflow limitations.

findings: Validation commands are present and repo-local, but generated asset provenance is not yet available.
required_fixes: Add generated-asset manifest, claims register, and checklist adherence fixtures.

findings: No publication figures, plots, tables, or Cosmograph-compatible graph assets are included yet.
required_fixes: Generate diagrams, plots, tables, graph data, captions, alt text, and static fallbacks.

findings: The legal and official-reporting caveats are strong, but submission readiness could still be overread without checklist gates.
required_fixes: Keep submission, registry, live-source, and legal-certification gates explicit in all final outputs.

findings: The current note has not yet confronted alternative explanations, weak assumptions, or whether the ontology is too repo-specific.
required_fixes: Add discussion of generalisability, counterarguments, and limits of repo-local evidence.

next_actions: Complete the publication quality panel contracts.
Develop the ontology methods protocol and evidence inventory.
Develop the results/discussion report and generated visual assets.
Draft the journal-targeted manuscript and supplement.
Rerun all panel scorecards until every required score is greater than 95/100.
